name: Akkurat
classification_notes: Neutral grotesque with Swiss influences, sometimes described as a contemporary alternative to Helvetica and Akzidenz-Grotesk. Clean construction with subtle humanist details.
summary: A restrained Swiss grotesque that pairs precision with warmth, popular in editorial and identity work.
description: Akkurat is a grotesque sans-serif designed by Laurenz Brunner, released through Lineto before Element Type. It draws from the Swiss rational tradition while avoiding the coldness of Helvetica. Widely used in contemporary graphic design, it includes a companion monospaced family.
foundry_blurb: Akkurat is a clean, neutral grotesque designed for versatile use across editorial and screen applications, with a monospaced companion for technical settings.
